typography.font_strategy: The 'Old Money Tech' variant for industrial context: Squarish/Technical sans for marketing headings, highly legible functional sans for data.

colors.strategy: Industrial Steel. Base is stark white for clarity, with cool slate grays to mimic metal. Action color is an industrial Cobalt Blue, alerts in Signal Red.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: Mode B (Control Room Grid) for dashboards. High density but structured. Generous spacing (Mode A) for the customer portal and landing page.

surface_styles.strategy: Technical precision. Minimal shadows, strong use of 1px borders to separate modular widgets.
surface_styles.marketing_card: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.08)] transition-all rounded-lg
surface_styles.header_nav: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200 sticky top-0 z-50
surface_styles.inputs: bg-white border border-slate-300 focus:border-blue-600 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-600 rounded-sm text-slate-900

components.strategy: Use Shadcn highly customized for a flat, technical look. Erase the default Vercel aesthetic by sharp corners and steel colors.

buttons.primary: bg-blue-700 text-white hover:bg-blue-800 transition-colors rounded-sm px-4 py-2 font-medium shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-300 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors rounded-sm px-4 py-2 font-medium shadow-sm
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100 transition-colors rounded-sm px-4 py-2

components.tables: Dense rows, 1px border-b on cells. text-sm. Hover state on rows. Stick header.
components.badges: px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium rounded border

icons.style: Regular or Light weight for dashboard density. Duotone for marketing/empty states.

media_and_assets.strategy: High-end industrial macro photography and 3D architectural renders to convey precision.

images.description: Macro shot of a precision milled steel mechanical jig and fixture part, used for the main landing page hero background. Use with a dark gradient overlay if placing white text.
Abstract 3D architectural rendering of a modern steel factory layout, used for the login/auth split screen background.
Close up of CNC machining, to be used in marketing features or placeholder for QC reports.
Machine tool close up, usable for Work Order placeholders or Gallery.
Industrial steel structure, suitable for Customer Portal login background or About page.

testing_attributes.rule: MANDATORY: All interactive elements must include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case based on their role.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use @phosphor-icons/react for dense dashboard interfaces.
For the Landing Page, construct custom layout using Tailwind grid-cols-12 and avoid standard card-in-card designs. Overlap the hero image with clean white/steel blocks.
For the Dashboard, use Shadcn components heavily (Tables, Dialogs, Select, Tabs) but override default radii to be sharper (rounded-sm) and borders to be slate-200.
Implement Recharts for Dashboard KPIs (OEE, Machine utilization, Revenue, Open work orders).
Ensure all forms (PO creation, Quotation, QC Upload) have strong validation and accessible focus states (ring-blue-600).
For the Customer portal track-by-reference UI, use a clean centralized search bar interface, not a dense table.
